problem.label: The untapped channel
problem.title: Build a WhatsApp audience you own. The new era of newsletters
problem.lead: Your leads are in spreadsheets, email lists, and old CRMs. Meanwhile, they check WhatsApp 23 times a day. Convert your existing contacts into an opted-in WhatsApp list, then send them product offers, restocks, and promotions whenever you want. No algorithms. No ad spend. Just direct access to buyers who actually read your messages.
problem.stat2_desc: ad spend to reactivate your list
problem.callout: 3 billion people use WhatsApp daily. Your buyers are already there. You just need the bridge.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Upload. Send. Convert. Sell
howItWorks.lead: From your spreadsheet to WhatsApp sales in four steps.

step1.title: Upload & clean your list
step1.description: Drop your CSV or Excel. We auto-detect who has email, who has a mobile, and filter out invalid contacts. Split by country, product, or buyer type.

step2.title: Send email with WhatsApp button
step2.description: Your product offer goes out via email. Every email has a green "Message us on WhatsApp" button. When they click, they land in your WhatsApp with full opt-in consent.

step3.title: They click. Now they're yours.
step3.description: Every click is tracked. Every contact who messages you is automatically tagged as opted-in. You now own their WhatsApp number, and can sell to them whenever you want. Forever.

step4.title: Broadcast offers on WhatsApp
step4.description: New stock? New price? Send a WhatsApp broadcast to your entire opted-in list in 5 minutes. Product image, price, done. 98% will read it.

platform.feature6_desc: Two-stage opt-in flow. Click = pending. Message = confirmed. Legally compliant. No bans.

footer.tagline: Turn your contact list into WhatsApp sales

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Questions you might have
faq.q1: Will my WhatsApp number get banned?
faq.a1: No. ConvertChat uses Meta's official WhatsApp Business API, the same infrastructure used by brands like Unilever and Tata. We enforce a two-stage opt-in flow (click = pending, message = confirmed) so every contact in your list has explicitly consented. No spam, no bans.
faq.q2: Do I need a WhatsApp Business API account?
faq.a2: Not yet. If you don't have one, we'll set it up for you. We handle the Meta Business verification, phone number registration, and API connection as part of our onboarding. One-time setup fee. See our pricing page for details.
faq.q3: How does the email-to-WhatsApp opt-in actually work?
faq.a3: You send a product email through ConvertChat. Each email includes a green "Message us on WhatsApp" button. When a contact clicks it, they're redirected to your WhatsApp with a pre-filled message. The moment they send that message, they're automatically tagged as opted-in. You now own that WhatsApp contact, legally and permanently.
faq.q4: What happens when a contact replies on WhatsApp?
faq.a4: Two options. You can handle conversations manually through our built-in WhatsApp inbox with real-time chat, media support, and read receipts. Or, if you have our AI Agent enabled (Beta), it handles the conversation automatically: answers product questions, qualifies the lead, and routes hot buyers to you.
faq.a5: Yes. Our two-stage consent flow is designed for GDPR compliance. A click registers interest (pending). An actual WhatsApp message from the contact confirms consent (opted-in). We track and store consent status per contact with full audit trail. No unsolicited messages ever go out.
faq.q6: How many contacts can I import?
faq.a6: No hard limit. Upload CSV or Excel files with thousands of contacts. We auto-detect channels (email, mobile, landline), filter invalid entries, remove duplicates, and split into optimized send batches. Most customers start with 1,000-10,000 contacts.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No contracts.
pricing.subtitle: No seat minimums. Cancel anytime. 0% markup on WhatsApp messages.

enterprise.title: Need more?
enterprise.body: Higher volumes, multiple numbers, tailored onboarding — we'll build you a custom plan on the call.

aiAddon.title: Add the AI Agent when you're ready.
aiAddon.body: It replies, qualifies and sells while you sleep.

costs.title: What messaging actually costs.
costs.c1Title: WhatsApp fees go straight to Meta
costs.c1Body: You pay Meta at cost for every message. We add 0% markup — ever.
costs.c2Body: That's the typical Meta rate in most markets. Replies within the 24-hour window are free.
costs.c3Body: Your plan covers your monthly email volume. No extra bills.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: In 30 minutes we connect your WhatsApp, import your contacts and set up your first campaign together.
faq.a2: No. Monthly billing, cancel anytime, no seat minimums.
faq.a3: Meta bills you directly at cost — a marketing message costs roughly $0.06 in most markets. Replies within the 24-hour window are free. We add 0% markup.
faq.a4: Yes — switch up or down anytime; changes apply at your next billing cycle.
faq.q5: Do I need a new phone number?
faq.a5: Your existing number or a new one both work; we set it up together on the call.
